content: Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback pipeline for unsupervised output refinement can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that retains Self-Refine’s advantage of no extra training or labeled data while fixing its limitation of blind spots from single-perspective feedback. This hybrid framework leverages internal inconsistencies between the LLM’s own alternative outputs as a free source of critical feedback, rather than relying on consistent self-evaluation from a single starting output.
